untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection (broadening wedge + double top formation) cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators. These require multi-bar pattern recognition, swing point identification, and geometric shape analysis that fall outside the scope of single-bar technical indicators. The entry condition 'Price closes below the lower trend line of the wedge' requires prior identification of the wedge's trend lines, which is not supported.
translation_notes: Signal contains pattern-based logic that requires shape/geometric detection beyond available indicators. Translated close below pivot as a proxy for breakout below support, and used sma_20 as a reasonable exit condition for reversal. Target calculation (Double Top Measure Rule) is deterministic and should be implemented in position sizing logic rather than entry/exit rules. Success rate of 72% and average decline of 19% are informational only. Stop placement marked as AUTHOR_SILENT per source material.
